---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `./run.sh`
2. Press '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, paste the terminal output or a screenshot. (Run the app from a
terminal so any error/traceback is visible.)

## Environment

- macOS version: (e.g. 14.4 / 15.x / 26.x)
- Python version: `python3 --version`
- Microphone / audio device(s):
- System-audio capture on? (yes/no)
- Transcription language (tr/en):

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (recent changes, permissions granted, etc.).
